description: Calculate the Pole of Inaccessibility for Somalia using the Natural Earth countries dataset located at /home/ga/GIS_Data/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.geojson. Ensure calculations are performed using EPSG:3857 with a tolerance of 1000 meters. Export the resulting point feature to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/somalia_pole.geojson and record the distance to the boundary in kilometers in a text file at /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/distance_report.txt.
